title: AI Engineer World's Fair 2026 Day 2 Livestream
summary: AI Engineer World's Fair 2026 Day 2 livestream held July 1, 2026 at Moscone West in San Francisco. The event features keynote sessions and main-stage programming covering AI engineering topics throughout the day.
writeup: This livestream carries Day 2 of the AI Engineer World's Fair 2026, held July 1, 2026 at Moscone West in San Francisco. The programming consists of keynote sessions and main-stage talks covering AI engineering topics across the day. As a conference stream, it aggregates the event's central presentations rather than a single thesis.
